school.name: Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City
Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology
school.group: Vietnam National University Ho Chi Minh City

role_description: Learned and collaborated professional software developments workflows with an Agile team environment, engaging in analyzing and clarifying functional requirements from clients
Explored and obtained the overview about e-commerce business logic, system components, and the technologies for developing this product through project documents
Engaging in team meetings to analyze the complicated business requirements, proposing and explaining the solutions those requirements
Engineered the RESTful APIs from analyzing the business logic to the services, even researching and fixing bugs are raised from other teams

personal_project.name: Full-stack Healthcare Application
description: Designed the 20+ RESTful APIs across microservices serving front-end application
Synchronized with the data are rendered real-time between website and mobile platform to ensure there are no contradictions when the users interact some functions on user interface

Implemented face-detection pipeline real-time using SSD ResNet-10 and OpenFace nn4.small2 for achieving face detection and recognition, the result are 98% accuracy threshold detecting face and 60%+ accuracy for checking similarity.
Architected a high-performance messaging system using WebSocket & StompJS protocols, bi-directional communicate for over 1,000+ messages daily with sub-100ms response time
Integrated QR-based payment online via banking Sepay APIs real-time, supporting various of banking type and handling concurrently

personal_project.name: Social Network Application
description: Implemented a security infrastructure using Spring Security and Spring OAuth2 with Keycloak, guaranteeing some sensitive user endpoints have to be protected through validating Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)

Architected high-performance real-time messages using WebSocket & StompJS protocols, serving for over 500 requests daily from sending, calling or notifcation messages with ensuring the response must be in range sub-200ms to sub-1000ms response time
Implemented the WebRTC technique in frontend for engineering phone or video calls between users gather real-time with the response time in range sub-100ms to sub-2000ms, dependence on user’s network
